About: It is about a new stage in Marxist theory and practice.
It is about a unified, coherent higher stage of Marxism.
HasA: It has the theory of New Democracy.
It has the theory of the mass line.
It has the law of contradiction.
It has the military strategy of protracted people's war.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Mao Zedong's philosophical works.
It was influenced by Vladimir Lenin's theory of the vanguard party.
IsA: It is a term used by some communist groups.
It is a unified, coherent higher stage of Marxism.
It is a new, third and higher stage of Marxism.
It is the guiding ideology of the Revolutionary Internationalist Movement.
It is a national communist party.
UsedAs: It is used as the guiding ideology.
It is used as a military strategy.
It is used as a political ideology.
UsedFor: It is used for the revolutionary leadership of the masses.
It is used for consolidation of the dictatorship of the proletariat.
It is used for strengthening of the party.
It is used for the building of socialism.
It is used for the construction and consolidation of socialism.
UsedIn: It is used in semi-feudal and semi-colonial countries.
It is used in developed countries.
It is used in the global periphery.
It is used in industrial capitalist countries.
It is used in Latin America.
It is used in Asia.
It is used in the Philippines.
It is used in the United States.
It is used in Nepal.
It is used in India.
UsedTo: It is used to overthrow the government of India.
It is used to seize power through workers' uprisings.
It is used to side with the proletariat against colonialism, imperialism and the comprador-bourgeoisie.
